name: di2va-extension
description: Di2va browser extension — Shimano Di2 gear overlay for Strava

scripts.package:source: cd .. && zip -r extension/di2va-source-v$npm_package_version.zip extension/src extension/popup extension/options extension/icons extension/manifest.json extension/webpack.config.js extension/package.json extension/package-lock.json -x '*.DS_Store'
